title: TFC Anvil Forge Helper
description: Simple resource pack to make your anvil experience in TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) more convenient.
body:
Simple resource pack to make your anvil experience in TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) more convenient.

The main problem of forging on anvil in TFC is that you have no idea what to do in order to make what you want. All operations just do something and sometimes crash an item.

This datapack is an answer to the questions. It changes the anvil interface and make it more clear how forging with anvil works.

There are two ways to use this datapack:
* To understand a forging mechanics, find your way to forge things and then disable it;
* Just use permanently.

### Installation

Put archive into `resources` folder in minecraft instance forlder.
